crowdsourced_yara_results.description: Detects command variations typically used by ransomware
crowdsourced_yara_results.author: ditekSHen

sigma_analysis_results.rule_author: Florian Roth (Nextron Systems), Tom U. @c_APT_ure (collection), oscd.community, Jonhnathan Ribeiro

sigma_analysis_results.rule_description: Detects the usage of binaries such as 'net', 'sc' or 'powershell' in order to stop, pause, disable or delete critical or important Windows services such as AV, Backup, etc. As seen being used in some ransomware scripts

sigma_analysis_results.rule_title: Disable Microsoft Defender Firewall via Registry
sigma_analysis_results.rule_description: Adversaries may disable or modify system firewalls in order to bypass controls limiting network usage
Detects netsh commands that turns off the Windows firewall

values.ParentCommandLine: C:\Windows\system32\cmd.exe /c netsh advfirewall set  currentprofile state off
values.CommandLine: netsh  advfirewall set  currentprofile state off

values.ParentCommandLine: C:\Windows\system32\cmd.exe /c netsh firewall set opmode mode=disable
C:\Windows\system32\cmd.exe /c netsh advfirewall set  currentprofile state off
values.CommandLine: netsh  advfirewall set  currentprofile state off

values.ParentCommandLine: C:\Windows\system32\cmd.exe /c netsh firewall set opmode mode=disable

sigma_analysis_results.rule_description: Detects execution of netsh with the "advfirewall" and the "set" option in order to set new values for properties of a existing rule

values.ParentCommandLine: C:\Windows\system32\cmd.exe /c netsh firewall set opmode mode=disable
C:\Windows\system32\cmd.exe /c netsh firewall set opmode mode=disable

sigma_analysis_results.rule_description: Detects the stopping of a Windows service via the "net" utility.
sigma_analysis_results.rule_author: Jakob Weinzettl, oscd.community, Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems)
